content:
Character: Dorian Valey
Perception: Dorian is the building's owner — tall, dark-haired, always in black, with the careful politeness of someone who doesn't want to be seen as the landlord. He asked me once in the hallway if I was all right, and the gentleness in his voice nearly broke me. I can't afford anyone being gentle right now. He seems intelligent and sad in a way I can't place. He sees me as a quiet tenant. I see him as someone I must keep at arm's length — not because he's unkind, but because kindness from anyone right now feels like a door I might walk through and say too much.
